requirements.jd_requirement: Implement and manage the Information Security Program including security incident response, vulnerability management, data protection, and risk management
requirements.matched_skills: Vulnerability remediation automation, Endpoint hardening workflows, Patch orchestration, Risk reduction engineering
requirements.evidence: Built deployable security controls and remediation automation for endpoint fleets at scale; led risk reduction initiatives grounded in measurable outcomes rather than theoretical frameworks.

requirements.jd_requirement: Lead Cybersecurity Incident Response Team to triage and investigate security incidents
requirements.matched_skills: Endpoint hardening workflows, Vulnerability remediation automation, Security tooling integration (EDR/XDR/SOAR)
requirements.evidence: Operationalized incident response via EDR/XDR orchestration and runbook-driven automation; reduced mean-time-to-remediation through standardized triage workflows.

requirements.jd_requirement: Conduct vulnerability assessments and architecture reviews of products and cloud infrastructure
requirements.matched_skills: AWS ECS deployments, IAM implementation, Service hardening, Secure cloud operations
requirements.evidence: Designed and hardened containerized services on AWS ECS with IAM least-privilege controls, secrets management, and runtime observability.

requirements.jd_requirement: Collaborate with Sales and Legal on security questionnaires, contracts, and regulatory compliance
requirements.matched_skills: Requirements-to-controls translation, Stakeholder communication, Operational documentation
requirements.evidence: Translated complex compliance requirements (SOC2, ISO 27001) into technical controls and operational documentation used by Sales and Legal teams.

requirements.jd_requirement: Develop and maintain security policies, standards, procedures; represent Security Team during audits
requirements.evidence: Authored and maintained runbooks and security standards adopted across engineering teams; served as key liaison during internal/external audits.

requirements.jd_requirement: Provide security expertise and guidance to engineering and business teams; develop technical solutions to mitigate vulnerabilities
requirements.matched_skills: CI/CD pipelines, Infrastructure as Code, Automated build and deploy workflows
requirements.evidence: Embedded security into CI/CD pipelines via IaC scanning, automated policy checks, and self-service guardrails for engineering teams.

requirements.jd_requirement: Ensure technical security controls are in place, maintained and audited on a periodic basis
requirements.matched_skills: Remediation scripting, Runbook-driven automation, Administrative tooling
requirements.evidence: Built Python/PowerShell tooling to automate control validation and remediation, enabling self-service audits with minimal manual overhead.

requirements.matched_skills: AWS ECS deployments, IAM implementation, Secrets management, Secure cloud operations
requirements.evidence: Designed and operated secure AWS environments using ECS, IAM roles, Secrets Manager, and VPC hardening patterns across multiple product lines.

requirements.jd_requirement: 10+ years in InfoSec and compliance; solid knowledge of ISO 27001, NIST
requirements.matched_skills: Risk reduction engineering, Deployable security controls, Vulnerability remediation automation
requirements.evidence: Implemented ISO 27001/NIST-aligned controls as operational workflows—not just policy documents—ensuring adoption and sustainability.
Holds CISSP and leverages certification knowledge to translate frameworks into executable security engineering practices.

tone_notes: Match Coursera’s tone: grounded, builder-oriented, and mission-aligned. Emphasize operational reliability over theoretical security; highlight cross-functional enablement (Engineering, Sales, Legal); avoid AI hype—focus on applied, auditable tooling.
summary_angle: Position Conner as a security engineer who builds and operates scalable, maintainable controls—especially at the intersection of cloud infrastructure, automation, and compliance—where messy operational realities meet enterprise-grade security needs.
